report_name: Hims & Hers Faces Class Action Probe After Third-Party Vendor Breach

attack_patterns.name: Trusted Relationship
attack_patterns.description: Attackers gained indirect access to Hims & Hers' data by compromising its third-party customer service vendor, Zendesk.

attack_patterns.name: Data from Cloud Storage
attack_patterns.description: An unauthorized user accessed sensitive customer service tickets stored within the Zendesk SaaS platform.

attack_patterns.name: Valid Accounts
attack_patterns.description: An unauthorized user gained access to the Zendesk platform, likely using compromised credentials, to access customer data.

identities.name: Hims & Hers, Inc.
identities.description: A telehealth and online pharmacy company that suffered a data breach due to a compromise at its third-party vendor, Zendesk.

identities.name: Zendesk
identities.description: A customer service platform provider that was compromised, leading to a data breach for its client, Hims & Hers, Inc.
